notes: Added Health Check overview for Work folder, data files, templates, updates, and snapshots.
Added Broken Link Center filters for tasks, templates, missing targets, and URL shortcuts.
Improved broken-link detection for older records and URL shortcut records.
Added clearer repair status counts without touching Work files during scans.
Keeps V1.0.6 reliability fixes for Template targets and URL-to-file edits.
No Setup wizard is shown during in-app silent updates and SA CHECK stays closed after update.
No user Work folders, settings, or cache are cleared by this update.
